corrected_fields.summary: This source describes the Treasury's Terrorist Finance Tracking Program (TFTP), a counter-terrorism initiative that uses SWIFT financial messaging data to trace terrorist financing networks. The content is about national security policy and has no relevance to market structure or macro catalysts for financial market research.
